_comment: ContentScale pipeline filter configuration. All filters default to their original hardcoded behaviour — set 'enabled: true' to activate new ones.

batch._comment: Batch processing defaults. default_limit applies when no --limit flag is given. Set to null to process all leads by default.

website_classifier._comment: Controls for the website offer classifier. fetch_timeout: seconds before a request is abandoned. page_char_limit: how many characters of page text to analyse. min_body_chars: if requests returns fewer chars than this, Playwright is used to re-fetch the JS-rendered page.

input._comment: Column mapping and source settings. column_map keys are the standard pipeline names; values are the actual column names in your CSV. Leave empty to use Sales Navigator defaults.

prescreen._comment: Sales Navigator mismatched-filter rules. Only applies when source_type is 'sales_navigator'.

title_filter._comment: Substring match on job_title (case-insensitive). require_any: must match at least one. exclude_any: discard if any match.

location_filter._comment: Substring match on location field. mode 'include' keeps only listed locations; mode 'exclude' drops them.

industry_filter._comment: Substring match on LinkedIn company industry. mode 'include' keeps only listed industries; mode 'exclude' drops them.

keyword_filter._comment: Keyword scan across selected company profile fields. fields options: company_description, company_specialities, summary, headline.

revenue_filter._comment: Filter by LinkedIn revenue range. Values in USD integers (e.g. 500000 = $500K). null disables the bound.

tenure_filter._comment: Minimum months the lead must have been at their primary company.

primary_score_filter._comment: Filter by multi-company scoring. min_score: absolute floor. min_score_margin: primary must beat second-best by this many points.

multi_company_filter._comment: Controls for leads with multiple active roles.

contact_filter._comment: Hard requirements on contact info. These are standalone booleans, not grouped under 'enabled'.

activity_filter._comment: Discard leads who haven't been active on LinkedIn in the last N days. Requires 'last linkedin activity' column.

offer_classifier._comment: Controls which offer classifications cause a discard vs a flag. Add/remove from discard_on to change behaviour.

youtube._comment: YouTube API behaviour controls. person_name_search: when false, skips Stage 3 (search by person name) and Stage 4 (combined search) — only website scrape and company name search are used. This prevents false matches on common names.

ddg_search._comment: DuckDuckGo integration (free, no API key). channel_discovery: search for YouTube channel URL before spending 100 YouTube API units on search.list. offer_fallback: re-classify UNCLEAR/FETCH_FAILED sites using a DDG search snippet. clutch_enrichment: search Clutch.co for revenue range and min project size to improve affordability scoring.

icp._comment: ICP definition used in multi-company scoring. target_niche overrides the TARGET_NICHE env var when set. scoring_weights override the hardcoded multipliers.
